text: TEHRAN CARNAGE: 33+ killed in overnight residential strikes — Baharestan (13 dead incl 6 children under 10), Alborz (18 dead incl 2 infants), Shahriar (9 dead), Pardis (6 bodies recovered). Rafi-Nia Synagogue 'completely destroyed.'

sources.name: Al Jazeera — Synagogue destroyed, residential strikes
Middle East Eye — Strikes destroy synagogue

text: KHADEMI KILLED: IRGC intelligence chief Maj. Gen. Majid Khademi (IRGC No. 2) + Quds Force commander Asghar Bagheri killed in Israeli precision strike. Continues pattern of targeted assassinations of Iranian military leadership.

sources.name: Fox News — IDF confirms IRGC intel chief killed
Washington Times — Top IRGC official killed

text: KHARG ISLAND: New explosions reported on Iran's main oil export terminal hours before Trump deadline. Iranian state media confirms 'American-Zionist attacks.' Island handles ~90% of Iran's oil exports.

DAY 39 MIDDAY: Istanbul consulate attack — 3 gunmen fire on Israeli consulate, 1 killed, 2 captured. Iran calls human chains around power plants. King Fahd Causeway closed. Houthis attack 3 ships + 2 US frigates. Iranian missiles at S. Israel intercepted. DEADLINE 8PM ET.
US CONFIRMS: 50+ military targets struck on Kharg Island — bunkers, storage, air defense. Oil infrastructure NOT targeted per US officials. Attack came hours before Trump 8PM ET deadline.

sources.name: NBC News — US strikes Kharg Island
Al-Monitor — US strikes military targets Kharg

text: IDF INFRASTRUCTURE WAVE: 10 bridges and railways struck across Iran — Kashan (2 killed, 3 injured), Tabriz-Zanjan, Qom, Karaj, Qazvin. IDF warns Iranians to avoid all trains until 21:00 Iran time.

TRUMP: 'A whole civilization will die tonight.' Threatened every bridge and power plant in Iran. 'Not at all' concerned about war crimes. Iran rejected 45-day ceasefire with 10 conditions. DEADLINE 8PM ET.

NETANYAHU PASSOVER ADDRESS: Compares strikes to 'Ten Plagues.' Claims 70% of Iran's steel production destroyed. 'This is no longer the same Iran.' IDF eliminated missile commander Makram Atimi in Kermanshah.

sources.name: Times of Israel — Netanyahu Passover address

text: UNSC VETO: Russia and China block Bahrain-sponsored Hormuz resolution. Vote 11-2. Multilateral path to reopening strait now dead. Trump deadline only remaining pressure.
IRAN CUTS TIES: Tehran officially severs all diplomatic and indirect channels with US after Trump's 'civilization will die' threat. Pakistan back-channel still active.

JUBAIL HIT: IRGC fires 11 ballistic missiles + 18 drones at Saudi Eastern Province. All intercepted but debris strikes SABIC petrochemical complex. Fire at Jubail Industrial City. Evacuations underway.
KHAMENEI LEAK: US/Israeli intel memo — Mojtaba Khamenei unconscious and incapacitated in Qom. Wounded Feb 28. Never appeared publicly. Only AI-generated video. Iran insists he governs.
IRAN PEACE PLAN: 10-point proposal includes security guarantees, Hormuz toll (~$2M/ship), sanctions lifting. Trump: 'significant but not good enough.' Diplomatic channels cut hours later.

KING FAHD CAUSEWAY CLOSED: Saudi-Bahrain bridge shut over Iranian air raid threats. US shelter-in-place for Americans in Bahrain. IDF hits Khorramshahr shipyards (80% of IRGC Navy). Kittleson freed in Baghdad.

CLUSTER BARRAGE: Iran fires 6 ballistic missile salvos at central/southern Israel — ~10 missiles per salvo with cluster munitions. ~50 submunition impact sites across Petah Tikva, Ramat Gan, Bnei Brak. 6 wounded including 1 seriously.

sources.name: Times of Israel — Iran fires salvos at Israel
FDD Long War Journal — Cluster munitions strike dozens of sites

text: IDF SHIRAZ STRIKES: Joint IAF/Navy operation destroys Iran's 'most central' sonar production facility + last remaining petrochemical plant for ballistic missile explosives. IDF claims 85%+ of Iran's petrochemical export capacity now inoperable.

sources.name: ANI News — IDF strikes underwater detection facility in Shiraz
The Media Line — IDF strikes petrochemical facility and missile site

text: ALI AL SALEM HIT: Iranian drone strike hits Ali Al Salem Air Base in Kuwait overnight — 15 Americans wounded. Most returned to duty. IRGC claims as part of Wave 98 of Operation True Promise 4.

sources.name: APA — 15 Americans wounded at Ali al-Salem
Al Mayadeen — Iranian drone strike on Ali Al Salem

text: ⚡ CEASEFIRE: Trump agrees to 2-week suspension of bombing Iran, subject to 'COMPLETE, IMMEDIATE, and SAFE OPENING of the Strait of Hormuz.' Pakistan PM Sharif mediated. Bloomberg: 'two-week ceasefire to finalize talks.'

sources.name: US News — Trump suspends bombing of Iran for two weeks
CNBC — Trump suspends Iran attack for two weeks
Bloomberg — Two-week ceasefire to finalize talks

text: IRAN ACCEPTS: Supreme National Security Council formally accepts two-week ceasefire. FM Araghchi: 'Safe passage through Hormuz will be possible via coordination with Iran's Armed Forces.' China gave 'last-minute nudge.'

sources.name: Al Jazeera — Iran agrees to reopen Hormuz

text: OIL CRASH: Brent plunges ~16% to ~$93, WTI drops ~19% to ~$92 in after-hours — biggest one-day drop since 1991 Gulf War. S&P 500 futures +2.4%, Dow +1,000 pts. Markets rebound by morning on ceasefire skepticism.

sources.name: Axios — Oil prices plunge on ceasefire
NBC News — Oil prices plunge, stocks rally

text: ISLAMABAD TALKS: Pakistan confirms peace talks begin Friday April 10. VP Vance to lead US delegation. PM Sharif: 'Both parties have displayed remarkable wisdom.' Goal: conclusive agreement within 2-week window.

sources.name: Axios — US, Iran ceasefire via Pakistan
Al Jazeera — Why Vance joined Pakistan mediation

text: NETANYAHU RESISTS: Israeli PM asked Trump NOT to accept ceasefire, citing 'significant risks.' Israel not party to the agreement. IDF operations in Lebanon continue. Ground troops pushing deeper into southern Lebanon.

sources.name: Times of Israel — Netanyahu asks Trump not to move forward with ceasefire

text: GAS UPDATE: AAA national average $4.119/gal (April 8). First time above $4 since August 2022. EIA forecasts April peak at $4.30/gal. GasBuddy: ceasefire means 'two more weeks of status quo' — pump prices won't drop quickly.

sources.name: AAA Newsroom — First time in four years over $4
